overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a futuristic monorail train traveling through a dense cyberpunk city. The journey transitions from narrow urban canyons between towering buildings to open panoramic views of skyscrapers, waterways, and bridges under a clear blue sky, showcasing high-fidelity game engine graphics typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train interior passing through narrow urban canyon between close buildings

agents.ego_description: seated passenger observing the passing cityscape through the train window as the train moves through a narrow corridor of buildings

entered.detail: futuristic monorail interior with blue upholstered seats and metallic handrails
building facade with glowing red neon signage and holographic advertisements
modern building with reflective glass windows passing by closely
interior digital displays showing route information above the seats

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a futuristic monorail train moving through a narrow urban canyon. The camera captures the interior with blue seats and digital displays while buildings with neon signs and glass facades pass by extremely close to the train windows, creating an enclosed, corridor-like sensation.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train crossing over urban waterway with bridge views

events.description: train emerges from narrow building corridor into open view overlooking waterway and bridges

agents.ego_description: continuing journey as the train emerges from the enclosed canyon into open air above a canal

entered.detail: wide water canal running through the city with concrete retaining walls
large concrete bridge structure spanning across the waterway
tall cream-colored skyscraper with dark windows and the number 04 visible on the facade

segments.scene_description: The train breaks free from the narrow corridor into an expansive view overlooking a waterway. A prominent yellow skyscraper rises in the distance while the train passes over a concrete bridge, revealing the open sky and wider cityscape for the first time.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic view of cyberpunk cityscape with industrial district and towering skyscrapers

events.description: passing by prominent red and black industrial buildings with large holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: traveling at elevated height with expansive views of the city skyline and industrial architecture

entered.detail: large industrial structure with red and black striped facade and multiple billboards
cylindrical orange-brown water tank on metal supports atop a building
large digital advertising screens displaying colorful holographic content

segments.scene_description: The train travels through an open panoramic section with views of a prominent yellow skyscraper and industrial buildings featuring holographic billboards. A rusted water tower sits atop one of the red industrial buildings as the train maintains its elevated trajectory over the waterway.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large stadium arena structure with highway interchanges

events.description: large circular stadium structure comes into view on the horizon marking a new architectural zone

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the line with the stadium structure becoming prominent in the view

entered.detail: massive circular sports stadium with tiered seating visible and tall light towers
multi-level highway interchange with concrete support pillars

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a massive circular stadium arena in the distance as the train passes over highway interchanges. The industrial buildings shift to the left while the stadium dominates the center view, indicating the train is approaching a major transit hub or destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a futuristic monorail as it transitions from a claustrophobic urban canyon into a vast, open cityscape. It begins inside the train cabin among blue seats and digital displays, where neon signs and glass facades blur past the windows to create an enclosed, corridor-like sensation. As the train breaks free from the narrow buildings, the view expands across a concrete bridge to reveal a wide waterway and a prominent yellow skyscraper under an open sky. The scene then shifts toward an industrial district featuring holographic billboards and a rusted water tower atop a red building while maintaining an elevated trajectory over the water. Finally, the perspective glides over complex highway interchanges as the industrial landscape recedes, leaving a massive circular stadium arena to dominate the horizon.
